Off Calendar Apr-19-2010 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-19-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael Hall, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Dinell Cross, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Lucinda Blue.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 30, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Real Estate Lease, dated 8/01/09-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit--2--Amended Three Day Notice to Cure
Covenants or Quit, dated 2/24/10-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Dinell Cross, and against defendant Lucinda Blue as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $2,236.38.
Holdover Damages - $1,583.50.
Costs - $370.00.

Total - $4,189.88.

Additionally, plaintiff Dinell Cross is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 320 Powhattan Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94110. The rental agreement is canceled.

Counsel stipulated to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Continued To Apr-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
